name: Tee24 - Driving Range & Practice Facility
about: Tee24 is a professional-caliber indoor practice facility with 24/7 access, offering both driving range and simulator course play across two locations in Louisville and Clarksville. The facility is equipped with GSPro simulator software and advanced swing analytics technology to help golfers optimize their practice time. It offers a variety of affordable memberships and day passes, positioning itself as Kentuckiana's most cost-effective option for golf improvement with a focus on technology, convenience, and accessibility for all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access allows for practice at any time
GSPro simulator technology for realistic play on over 150,000 courses
Advanced swing analytics to optimize practice sessions
Affordable memberships with various tiers to suit different needs

food_and_drink.notes: Snacks available with a discount for members

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website mentions the facility is a practice environment but does not explicitly state if club rentals are available or if you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website mentions discounts on snacks are available for members, but does not explicitly state if outside food and drink are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes on a simulator.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendly features or policies.
